items.title: Australian Dollar struggles as RBA rate hike odds decrease
items.summary: AUD/USD inches lower after opening at a bullish gap, remaining within the positive territory and trading around 0.7160 during the Asian hours on Friday.

items.summary_ko: 강세 갭에서 개장 후 AUD/USD 인치가 낮아지고, 긍정적인 영역 내에 남아 있으며 금요일 아시아 시간 동안 0.7160 정도 거래됩니다.

items.title: Euro drifts lower against British Pound ahead of Germany's inflation data, BoE's Bailey speech
